title: Invitation Control - Adding Viewers Only Option Needed for members
excerpt: I’d like to be able to give all my members the ability to add Viewers only, so they don’t accidently invite people as members in error so I’m not constantly having to add viewers for them but also have control on the lic…

posts.author: MelB (Melanie Broxis)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to give all my members the ability to add Viewers only, so they don’t accidently invite people as members in error so I’m not constantly having to add viewers for them but also have control on the licences as we have a strict budget protocol and many many departments.
